name: Fashioned Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and brown sugar in a bowl until light and fluffy.
2. Blend in the mashed sweet potatoes and eggs.
3. Add the remaining 4 ingredients; mix well.
4. Pour into the prepared pie shell.
5. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes.
6. Reduce heat to 325°F and bake 35 to 45 minutes longer, or until set.
